_comment: MCP 2025-03 tool manifest. `annotations` is an extension allowed by the spec's `additionalProperties`; see specs/README.md for the design rationale.

tools.name: find_similar
tools.description: Retrieve the top-k similar products from the catalog. IMAGE-NATIVE: provide an image (`image_b64` inline base64, or `image_ref` storage key) for visual kNN, OR a `text` query for text kNN. The tool embeds the input internally (ViT for images, CLIP-text for text) and runs pgvector kNN; it does NOT accept a pre-computed embedding. Optional `attrs` narrow the search.

image_b64.description: Inline base64-encoded image bytes (image modality). Embedded to a 768-d ViT vector internally.

image_ref.description: Storage key resolved by the server to image bytes (image modality). Alternative to image_b64.

text.description: Free-text query (text modality), used when no image is supplied. Embedded to a 512-d CLIP-text vector internally.

attrs.description: Attribute filters narrowing the kNN search before similarity ranking. An explicit `colour` constrains the candidate set.

tools.name: extract_attributes
tools.description: Extract a structured attribute object suitable for `find_similar`. IMAGE-NATIVE: provide an image (`image_b64` inline base64, or `image_ref` storage key) plus the user's text. On image turns `category`/`colour` are sourced from the ViT attribute head (the tool embeds the image internally) and the LLM is asked only for the text-derived `formality`/`occasion`; with no image the LLM supplies all four. Invokes the LLM.

image_b64.description: Inline base64-encoded image bytes. The ViT attribute head sources category/colour from it.

image_ref.description: Storage key resolved by the server to image bytes. Alternative to image_b64.

user_text.description: The user's accompanying chat message (may be empty).
